productDisplayName: Provogue Men Formal Black Formal Shoes
description: Stylish and uber cool, these formal slip-ons with a pointed toe design from provogue add that extra bounce to your step. Perfect for those who love to slip in and out of their footwear with ease, this pair offers comfort and style with its crinkled pattern. Team it with your formal trousers for that classy look.UpperShiny leather upper for added durability and styleConcealed elastic gores on either side of the lace closure for a versatile FitSlip-on design for easy removal and wearing of shoesStitch detailing on the sides of the forefoot for added durabilityMock strap across the tongue for maximum styleLightly padded collar for in-step comfort and snug fitMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and supportCushioned footbed for added comfortLeather inner for absorbing moisture and keeping feet dry OutsoleLightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorptionRaised heel with textured pattern for ergonomic comfort and stylePivot point below the forefoot region for great flexibility of the footshoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
